006package com.stuypulse.robot.util;
007
008import com.stuypulse.stuylib.control.Controller;
009import com.stuypulse.stuylib.control.angle.AngleController;
010import com.stuypulse.stuylib.math.Angle;
011import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
012import edu.wpi.first.math.kinematics.ChassisSpeeds;
013
014public class HolonomicController {
015
016    private Controller xController;
017
018    private Controller yController;
019
020    private AngleController angleController;
021
022    public HolonomicController(
023            Controller xController, Controller yController, AngleController angleController) {
024        this.xController = xController;
025        this.yController = yController;
026        this.angleController = angleController;
027    }
028
029    public ChassisSpeeds update(Pose2d setpoint, Pose2d measurement) {
030        xController.update(setpoint.getX(), measurement.getX());
031        yController.update(setpoint.getY(), measurement.getY());
032        angleController.update(
033                Angle.fromRotation2d(setpoint.getRotation()),
034                Angle.fromRotation2d(measurement.getRotation()));
035        return getOutput();
036    }
037
038    public ChassisSpeeds getOutput() {
039        return ChassisSpeeds.fromFieldRelativeSpeeds(
040                xController.getOutput(),
041                yController.getOutput(),
042                angleController.getOutput(),
043                angleController.getMeasurement().getRotation2d());
044    }
045
046    public ChassisSpeeds getError() {
047        return ChassisSpeeds.fromFieldRelativeSpeeds(
048                xController.getError(),
049                yController.getError(),
050                angleController.getError().toDegrees(),
051                angleController.getMeasurement().getRotation2d());
052    }
053
054    public boolean isDone(
055            double xToleranceMeters, double yToleranceMeters, double angleToleranceDegrees) {
056        return xController.isDone(xToleranceMeters)
057                && yController.isDone(yToleranceMeters)
058                && angleController.isDoneDegrees(angleToleranceDegrees);
059    }
060}
